rules.label: High-Rise – NYC Amendments
rules.notes_template: NYC adds: photoluminescent egress markings (LL26/04), two-way radio coverage, reinforced egress stair/exit vestibules, stricter standpipe pressures.
rules.citation: NYC BC 2022 §403 / Local Law 26/04 – High-rise office and certain other occupancies require photoluminescent exit-path markings and other NYC-specific provisions.
rules.remediation: Add photoluminescent markings, NYC-specific standpipe sizing, and confirm two-way radio/repeater design.

rules.label: Construction Site Safety (Site Safety Plans)
rules.notes_template: NYC requires Site Safety Plans, sidewalk sheds, supported scaffold permits, crane permits per §3309 and supplemental NYC rules.
rules.citation: NYC BC 2022 §3309 – Construction site safety, including site safety plan requirements (10+ stories or 125+ ft).
rules.remediation: Engage a Site Safety Manager; submit a Site Safety Plan; coordinate with TR1/TR8.
